posts.name: Robert Alfert
posts.cooked:
I had an extremely negative gut reaction to that entire video, and I know virtually nothing about any of the individuals who now work there.

100%

I subscribe, but really for the reviews from one of our fellow Berserkers. Williams has wonderful reviews on Bordeaux and Beaujolais, among other things. His recent report on 2019 Bordeaux is excellent.

posts.name: Joseph Grassa
posts.cooked:
I had an extremely negative gut reaction to that entire video, and I know virtually nothing about any of the individuals who now work there.

100%

I subscribe, but really for the reviews from one of our fellow Berserkers. Williams has wonderful reviews on Bordeaux and Beaujolais, among other things. His recent report on 2019 Bordeaux is excellent.

I subscribe for Larner, but tbh I find several of the reviewers to be valuable. Very far from saying I agree with any of them even more than 75% of the time, including Larner, but they are more knowledgeable than I myself, and the vast majority of CT notes are, while they also try thousands of wines that I likely will not. I think that last part is a double edged sword, but it fills the gap where I cannot. The video definitely seems strange to me though, and certainly cannot help WA credibility among enthusiasts.
